reviews.review_description: This game is one of the hardest and most fast paced I’ve played and it has the best arcade look and feel.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the nice review. We're really glad to hear that our design choices in Walkaaos resonate with you and we hope you will enjoy our future content updates!

reviews.review_description: I really like this game!  Please keep working on this! Would love to see this continue!  See you at the top! Would love to see more power to the weapons, thanks!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words and we're very happy to hear that you enjoy Walkaaos. We do intend to keep updating the game with content and features at a steady pace. We have a few weapon related adjustments and additions coming up in the next patches, so hopefully they will improve the experience!
